title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: cloud-init bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for cloud-init is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The cloud-init packages provide a set of init scripts for cloud instances. Cloud instances need special scripts to run during initialization to retrieve and install SSH keys, and to let the user run various scripts.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel-9] cloud-init upgrade is overwriting modifications in disable-sshd-keygen-if-cloud-init-active.conf [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128882)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for cloud-init is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The cloud-init packages provide a set of init scripts for cloud instances. Cloud instances need special scripts to run during initialization to retrieve and install SSH keys, and to let the user run various scripts.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel-9] cloud-init upgrade is overwriting modifications in disable-sshd-keygen-if-cloud-init-active.conf [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128882)
